name: towerdefenceworld
description: Spherical hex tower-defence — shared routes, online rooms

scripts.build: npm run build -w @tdw/game-core && npm run build -w @tdw/server && npm run build -w @tdw/client
scripts.dev: npm run build -w @tdw/game-core && concurrently -k "npm run dev -w @tdw/server" "npm run dev -w @tdw/client"
scripts.dev:server: npm run build -w @tdw/game-core && npm run dev -w @tdw/server
